mapper.select: select m.perms from sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m on rm.menu_id = m.menu_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct rm.menu_id from sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select a.* , (select b.parent_id from sys_dept b where a.dept_id = b.dept_id) as dept_parent_id from sys_user a where a.username = #{username}
select user_id,username,name from sys_user where type=2 and status=1 and (username like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{word},'%')) or name like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{word},'%')))
select user_id,username,name from sys_user where user_id != 1 ORDER BY `status` DESC,convert(name using gbk) asc
select user_id,username,name from sys_user where status=1 and dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT su.user_id,su.username,su.name from sys_user su,sys_user_role sur where sur.user_id=su.user_id and sur.role_id =#{roleId} and su.status=1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, name, email, mobile, type, status, create_time, dept_id) values(#{username}, #{name}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{type}, #{status}, NOW(), #{deptId})
mapper.select: SELECT t1.user_id, t1.username, t1.`name`, t2.dept_id, t2.`name` from sys_user t1 LEFT JOIN sys_dept t2 on t1.dept_id = t2.dept_id WHERE t1.type = '2' and t1.username = #{userName}
